overview: A premium futuristic AI-ML portfolio website for Omkar Solat, showcasing skills, projects, and certifications with a modern dark theme and glassmorphism design.
features: Hero section with animated gradient orb and typing effect
Categorized skills with glowing animated badges
5 sample project cards in editable array format
Visual certification badge cards with platform logos
Custom cursor and scroll progress indicator
Animated navbar with active section highlighting
Fully responsive across mobile, tablet, and desktop
